phases_completed.summary: Repo skeleton: go.mod, .gitignore, cmd/ layout, internal/mappings/ scaffold, Makefile.
Mappings registry + migration tool. internal/mappings package: types/io/lookup/mutate/validate/path. cmd/migrate-legacy. 27 tests.

Broker core + IPC. internal/ipc (Op constants, message structs, Conn with writer mutex). internal/broker (paths, flock singleton, RouteKey, StubRegistry, Routes, handler, server). cmd/c3-broker main with mappings load + skeleton write + signal handling. 27 broker/ipc tests + previous tests; live smoke test confirmed: broker spawns, writes skeleton, accepts socket connection, responds to hello with hello_ack carrying ConnID, responds to list_topics, clean shutdown removes socket+pid files.
phases_completed.self_review: Aligned with locked spec v6. RouteKey solves the *int64 map-key bug per spec §4.2 (test TestRouteKey_MapKeyEqualityForGeneralTopic confirms two separate &1 collide as expected). flock singleton handles stale-pid recovery per §4.2.2. Multi-user socket path uses $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/c3.sock with /tmp/c3-$UID.sock fallback. Per-route serial executor pattern is plumbed (Routes table) but the actual goroutine-per-route worker comes in Phase 4 alongside channels (which generate the inbound jobs that need serializing). hello/hello_ack/list_topics/release/bye ops work; attach/tool_call/inbound deferred to Phase 4 (need channel layer).

phases_completed.phase_4_blocked_on: Plan 4 not yet written. Plan 4 covers spec §4.1 + §6: Telegram channel cleanroom Go implementation using gotgbot/v2. Channel interface, getUpdates loop, inbound emission, outbound tools, attach proposal flow with createForumTopic + cross-group search + validate-by-id, debounce window, cooldown-fallback, OnInbound plugin chain plumbing, manual JSON-RPC framing for notifications/claude/channel.
build.notes: Phase 1+2+3 complete: repo skeleton, mappings registry, broker core/IPC. Live broker daemon works end-to-end. Next plan (Plan 4) covers the Telegram channel + per-route worker integration.
